steps.tool_output:
Title:Iran football team coming to USA ‘for sure’ to play in World Cup, says Gianni Infantino
Source:The Indian Express
Description:FIFA President Gianni Infantino remains optimistic about Iran’s participation in the World Cup despite tensions with the US. He emphasizes the importance of keeping sports and politics separate and hopes for a peaceful situation by the tournament. US President Donald Trump previously expressed safety concerns and suggested Iran should not take part.
URL:https://indianexpress.com/shorts/sports/football/iran-football-usa-for-sure-play-world-cup-fifa-gianni-infantino-10639343/

Title:FIFA President Confirms Iran Will Play 2026 World Cup In USA 'For Sure' Despite Tensions
Source:News18
Description:FIFA president Gianni Infantino confirms Iran will play at the 2026 World Cup in North America despite Middle East tensions, stressing sport should build bridges beyond politics
URL:https://www.news18.com/sports/football/fifa-president-confirms-iran-will-play-2026-world-cup-in-usa-for-sure-despite-tensions-ws-lno-10035839.html
